title: Lily's Colorful Feelings
synopsis: Little Lily discovers that feelings have colors as she experiences different emotions throughout her day, from red anger to blue sadness to bright yellow happiness.

pages.text: This is Lily. Lily has many feelings.

illustration.description: A young girl with long curly auburn hair, fair skin with light freckles, green eyes standing in the center surrounded by swirling colors representing different emotions - red, blue, yellow, and purple abstract shapes floating around her
illustration.alt: Lily surrounded by colorful emotion swirls

pages.text: When Lily is mad, she feels RED. Red like fire. Red like stop.

illustration.description: Lily with long curly auburn hair, fair skin with light freckles, green eyes with an angry expression, surrounded by intense red swirls and jagged shapes creating an abstract angry background
illustration.alt: Angry Lily with red swirls around her

pages.text: When Lily is sad, she feels BLUE. Blue like rain. Blue like tears.

illustration.description: Lily with long curly auburn hair, fair skin with light freckles, green eyes looking sad with tears, blue raindrops falling around her against a deep blue abstract background
illustration.alt: Sad Lily with blue rain around her

pages.text: When Lily is happy, she feels YELLOW. Yellow like sunshine. Yellow like smiles.

illustration.description: Lily with long curly auburn hair, fair skin with light freckles, green eyes smiling brightly, surrounded by bright yellow sunshine rays and cheerful yellow abstract shapes
illustration.alt: Happy Lily with yellow sunshine around her

pages.text: All feelings are okay. Red feelings. Blue feelings. Yellow feelings. Lily loves all her colorful feelings!

illustration.description: Lily with long curly auburn hair, fair skin with light freckles, green eyes with arms outstretched, embracing a beautiful rainbow of emotion colors - red, blue, yellow swirling harmoniously around her
illustration.alt: Lily embracing all her colorful feelings

metadata.illustrationStyle: emotion mapped colors, angry red swirls, sad blue rain, happy yellow sunshine, abstract emotion backgrounds, Inside Out inspired, feeling visualization, color psychology

questions.question: What color does Lily feel when she is mad?
questions.explanation: When Lily is mad, she feels RED like fire and like stop signs.

questions.question: What color does Lily feel when she is sad?
questions.explanation: When Lily is sad, she feels BLUE like rain and like tears.

questions.question: What color does Lily feel when she is happy?
questions.explanation: When Lily is happy, she feels YELLOW like sunshine and like smiles.
